name: Logistics Route Loss Calculator
description: Calculates total route loss (cost and time) for a logistics route, identifying hidden loss drivers and suggesting improvement actions based on industrial engineering standards (Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Route Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

inputs.label: Planned Stops
inputs.businessContext: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

inputs.label: Average Stop Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.

inputs.label: Traffic Delay Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.

inputs.label: Driver Wage per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).

inputs.label: Vehicle Operating Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

rules.message: Average speed and route distance must be positive.
Average stop time cannot be negative.
Traffic delay factor must be between 0 and 1.
All cost inputs must be non-negative.
Transit time target must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost per km is above typical threshold (0.5 currency/km). Consider route optimization or vehicle efficiency review.
Number of planned stops exceeds 10. May increase idle time and handling losses.
Traffic delay factor exceeds 30%. Significant time loss expected. Consider alternative routing or time-of-day adjustments.
Target transit time is less than 120% of ideal driving time. Likely unrealistic without significant process improvements.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
